plan_1_write_off_years.rule: Plan 1 loans get written off.*?on or after 1 September 2006.*?written off\s*([0-9]+)\s*years

plan_1_interest_rate_pct.rule: Plan 1 interest-rate table: latest period '1 Sep 2024 to 31 Aug 2025', extracted rate column

plan_2_max_interest_rate_pct.rule: Plan 2 max-interest table: latest period '1 Sep 2024 to 31 Aug 2025', extracted rate column

weekly_expenditure_2024.rule: CSV row='FYE 2024', column='Real-terms mean weekly expenditure'

transport_weekly_2024.rule: Transport was the second biggest proportional expense at 14%\s*\(£?([0-9]+\.[0-9]+)\)

median_home_price_england_2024.rule: CSV row=England, column='Median House price (12 months to Sep 2024)'

rent_inflation_england_march_2024_pct.rule: Derived from CSV rows 'Mar 2023' and 'Mar 2024', column='England'

house_price_growth_uk_hpi_5y_avg_pct.rule: CSV column='UK HPI' trailing mean over last 60 non-null monthly observations (Mar 2019 to Feb 2024)

average_council_tax_band_d_england_2024_.rule: ODS Table_2 row='England', column='Average council tax including parish precepts (Band D)'

lease_extension_cost_jump_threshold_year.rule: When there are\s*([0-9]+)\s*years or less remaining on your lease, the cost of extending it increases significantly

median_household_disposable_income_uk_fy.rule: median household disposable income in the UK was £([0-9,]+), a decrease

mortgage_rate_2y_75ltv_pct.rule: BoE fromshowcolumns table series=IUMBV34, date=31 Jan 26

savings_return_1y_fixed_bond_pct.rule: BoE fromshowcolumns table series=IUMWTFA, date=31 Jan 26
